title: Indulgent Smoky Irish Lamb Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Irish stew featuring tender lamb, smoky dried red chillies, and a hint of sophistication from sous-vide cooking, making it a perfect flexitarian-friendly dish for special occasions.

ingredients.name: dried red chillies
ingredients.notes: crushed or 1 teaspoon dried red chilli flakes

instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb cubes with salt and pepper.
Seal the lamb cubes in a sous-vide bag with crushed dried red chillies and cook for 24 hours.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add chopped carrots and potatoes, cooking for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add low sodium lamb broth, cooked lamb, and tomato paste if using, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 30 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
